tasks.subject: Task 1: Add credentials resolver types to contract
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add bearerToken and xApiKey resolver constants and update the endpoint contract.

**Files:**
- Modify: `pkg/contract/endpoint.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- CredentialsResolver_BearerToken (2) and CredentialsResolver_XApiKey (3) constants exist
- ToCredentialsResolver handles bearerToken and xApiKey
- FromCredentialsResolver handles values 2 and 3
- EndpointView enum tag updated

**Verify:** `go build ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/contract/endpoint.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CredentialsResolver_BearerToken and CredentialsResolver_XApiKey constants exist", "EndpointView enum tag includes all values", "go build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add setCredentialsHeaders helper and refactor gateway
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extract shared setCredentialsHeaders function and refactor gateway to use credentials_resolver from endpoint.

**Files:**
- Modify: `pkg/server/gateway_helpers.go`
- Modify: `pkg/server/handle_gateway.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- setCredentialsHeaders function exists with correct behavior per resolver type
- buildUpstreamRequest uses resolver int32 instead of authType
- Gateway passes endpoint.CredentialsResolver to buildUpstreamRequest
- generalApiKey-only guard removed
- Client auth validation preserved (validateClientAuth)

**Verify:** `go build ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/gateway_helpers.go", "pkg/server/handle_gateway.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["setCredentialsHeaders function exists", "buildUpstreamRequest accepts resolver int32", "gateway uses endpoint.CredentialsResolver", "go build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add fetch-models API endpoint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add POST /provider-endpoints/fetch-models API with handler.

**Files:**
- Modify: `db/queries/provider_endpoint.sql`
- Modify: `pkg/contract/provider_endpoint.go`
- Modify: `pkg/server/handle_provider_endpoint.go`
- Modify: `pkg/server/server.go`
- Generated: `pkg/db/` (via sqlc generate)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- FetchModelsRequest/Response types and operation defined
- Handler fetches provider, binding, endpoint from DB
- Handler makes GET with setCredentialsHeaders and 10s timeout
- Response parsed with priority chain
- provider.provider_models updated on success
- 404/502/422 errors handled
- Operation registered

**Verify:** `go build ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["db/queries/provider_endpoint.sql", "pkg/contract/provider_endpoint.go", "pkg/server/handle_provider_endpoint.go", "pkg/server/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FetchModelsRequest/Response types exist", "handleFetchModels registered", "handler uses setCredentialsHeaders", "parseModelsResponse implements priority chain", "go build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Regenerate OpenAPI spec and dashboard types
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Regenerate openapi.yaml and dashboard API types.

**Files:**
- Modify: `openapi.yaml` (regenerated)
- Modify: `dashboard/src/api.d.ts` (regenerated)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- openapi.yaml includes fetchModels operation
- api.d.ts includes FetchModels types
- Dashboard type-check passes

**Verify:** `pnpm --dir dashboard type-check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["openapi.yaml", "dashboard/src/api.d.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --dir dashboard type-check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["openapi.yaml has fetchModels operation", "api.d.ts has FetchModels types", "dashboard type-check passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Update endpoint form with new credentials resolver options
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add bearerToken and xApiKey to endpoint form select.

**Files:**
- Modify: `dashboard/src/components/EndpointForm.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Dropdown shows 通用 API Key, Bearer Token, X-Api-Key
- Default is generalApiKey
- Dashboard builds

**Verify:** `pnpm --dir dashboard type-check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/components/EndpointForm.vue"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --dir dashboard type-check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Select has three resolver options", "dashboard type-check passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Add fetch-models icons and UI to binding panel
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add icons and implement fetch-models button in ProviderEndpointsPanel.

**Files:**
- Modify: `dashboard/src/ui/icons/paths.ts`
- Modify: `dashboard/src/components/ProviderEndpointsPanel.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- cloud-download, loader, check icons available
- Button appears only for /models paths
- Tabler icons for all states
- Loading/success/failure states work
- modelsFetched event emitted

**Verify:** `pnpm --dir dashboard type-check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/ui/icons/paths.ts", "dashboard/src/components/ProviderEndpointsPanel.vue"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --dir dashboard type-check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Three new icons in paths.ts", "fetch button conditional on path ending /models", "three visual states work", "modelsFetched event emitted"]}
```
